title: Odyssey, Book 14: The Swineherd
description: Book 14 of Homer's Odyssey: The Swineherd.
introduction: Book 14 of the Odyssey: The Swineherd. The Greek text follows the standard Homeric vulgate.

translation.original_text: Αὐτὰρ ὁ ἐκ λιμένος προσέβη τρηχεῖαν ἀταρπόν.
translation.text: Odysseus went to the hut of his faithful swineherd Eumaeus, who did not recognize him but welcomed him with generous hospitality. Eumaeus spoke lovingly of his absent master and bitterly of the suitors. Odysseus tested his loyalty with invented tales.
